title: Remove Licensed & Insured tab and related text

requirements.text: Remove the 'Licensed & Insured' tab/badge from the Navigation bar and any trust badges section where it appears (e.g., in the About component).

quotes: remove the tab that says Licensed & Insured

acceptanceCriteria: No element with the label 'Licensed & Insured' appears anywhere on the page.
Remaining tabs/badges are unaffected and display correctly.

requirements.text: Remove all occurrences of the text 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' from the page, including any section descriptions or sub-labels that reference licensing/bonding/insurance.

quotes: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.

acceptanceCriteria: The phrase 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' does not appear anywhere on the page.
No other licensing-related badge or text referencing this content remains visible.
Surrounding layout remains intact and does not show empty gaps or broken spacing.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter any other content, styling, or layout outside of the Licensed & Insured removal.
nonGoals: Redesigning or restructuring the About, Navigation, or Footer sections beyond the specified removals.
Adding new trust badges or replacing the removed content with anything else.
